EF0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN NEAR THE WEST BRANCH OF FISH CREEK. DEBRIS FROM THE YARD WAS FOUND 1/2 MILE AWAY. MAXIMUM WIND SPEEDS ESTIMATED TO BE 75 MPH.
